description: Comprehensive handwritten and digital notes covering the complete GATE Civil Engineering (CE) syllabus with theory, design procedures, solved examples, numerical problems, and previous year questions.

resources.title: Engineering Mathematics
resources.subtitle: Handwritten Notes
resources.description: Linear Algebra, Calculus, Differential Equations, Complex Variables, Probability, Numerical Methods and Vector Calculus with GATE PYQs.

resources.title: Structural Analysis
resources.subtitle: Digital PDF
resources.description: Determinate and indeterminate structures, force method, displacement method, influence lines, moving loads and matrix methods.

resources.title: RCC Design
resources.subtitle: Class Notes
resources.description: Limit State Design, beams, slabs, columns, footings, retaining walls, water tanks and prestressed concrete structures.

resources.title: Steel Structures Design
resources.subtitle: Handwritten Notes
resources.description: Design of tension members, compression members, beams, column bases, plate girders, welded and bolted connections.

resources.title: Geotechnical Engineering
resources.subtitle: Digital Notes
resources.description: Soil mechanics, permeability, consolidation, shear strength, earth pressure, slope stability and foundation engineering.

resources.title: Fluid Mechanics
resources.subtitle: Class Notes
resources.description: Fluid properties, hydrostatics, fluid kinematics, pipe flow, boundary layer, open channel flow and hydraulic machines.

resources.title: Hydrology and Water Resources
resources.subtitle: Digital PDF
resources.description: Hydrologic cycle, precipitation, infiltration, runoff, hydrographs, flood routing, groundwater and irrigation engineering.

resources.title: Transportation Engineering
resources.subtitle: Handwritten Notes
resources.description: Highway engineering, geometric design, pavement materials, traffic engineering, railway engineering, airport and harbour engineering.

resources.title: Environmental Engineering
resources.subtitle: Class Notes
resources.description: Water supply engineering, wastewater treatment, air pollution, solid waste management and environmental impact assessment.

resources.title: Surveying
resources.subtitle: Digital Notes
resources.description: Chain surveying, leveling, theodolite, traversing, contouring, total station, GPS, remote sensing and GIS fundamentals.
